description_long: This is a two-story detached house with a classic American suburban appearance, featuring light-colored horizontal siding and a dark shingled gable roof. The front facade includes a covered porch with white railings and columns, a central wooden door, and symmetrically arranged windows with shutters. A prominent brick chimney rises along one side of the house, and the attached garage is set back from the main structure. The foundation is clad in stone, adding a rustic touch to the otherwise traditional design. The windows are multi-paned, and the overall structure is rectangular with a projecting front gable and side extension.
description: A two-story suburban house with light siding, dark gable roof, front porch, and attached garage, featuring symmetrical windows and a brick chimney.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, central door, symmetrical windows with shutters, and attached garage on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the projecting front gable, chimney, and the depth of the house with visible porch railing.
description_view_2: Rear or side view displaying a long wall with multiple windows and shutters, and the stone foundation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view dominated by the tall brick chimney and a smaller gable, with part of the porch visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Central wooden door with a covered porch, white railings, columns, and steps leading up to the entry.
